texto: Nothing is more to mastery than practice and skills. Studies have shown that practicing five minutes daily is better than practicing once a week for three hours. And if you want to create a genuine culture of improvement, you must create those habits.
explicacao: Orientação direta de George Spafford sobre temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. A afirmação “Nothing is more to mastery than practice and skills. Studies have shown that practicing five minu…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a desenvolvimento-pessoal, self-improvement, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
